crime.value: Murder by stabbing in a school bathroom
crime.quote: he ran to me and stab me in the stomach

victim.value: Nana Chan, a high school girl who witnessed her boyfriend assaulting another girl and was killed to prevent her from calling 911
victim.quote: There was a boy that I really like killed me in the bathroom

closed_world.value: Tendo high school bathroom where the ghost is trapped
closed_world.quote: I can't leave the bathroom because that is the place where I die

culprit_and_motive.value: Nana's boyfriend killed her to prevent her from reporting his assault of another girl
culprit_and_motive.quote: before I take out my phone, he ran to me and stab me in the stomach

investigator.value: Nana Chan narrating as a ghost trapped in the bathroom
investigator.quote: My name is Nana Chan and I'm a highschool girl in Tendo high

red_herring.value: Missing person case disguised as elopement when actual murder occurred
red_herring.quote: it says that I elope with my boyfriend and both are missing

clue_fairness.value: Red diamond ring that allows ghost to become corporeal - key supernatural element revealed to reader
clue_fairness.quote: I wore the ring on my finger. My whole body shines and I can feel my feet touching the floor

social_world.value: High school social dynamics with boyfriend-girlfriend relationship power imbalance
social_world.quote: My name is Nana Chan and I'm a highschool girl in Tendo high

alibi.value: Narrator creates false explanations for supernatural symptoms (cold body, smell, stains)
alibi.quote: I have a cold body when I was young so....um..is just like that

media_and_audience.value: Newspaper misrepresents murder as elopement, shaping public perception of disappearance
media_and_audience.quote: In the newspaper, it says that I am missing...it says that I elope with my boyfriend

investigator_wound.value: Ghost narrator's isolation and inability to communicate truth about her own murder
investigator_wound.quote: I can't go see my families and friends now. I'm in the news paper and I can't explain what happen

_meta.title: ebook kattie huang i 039 m here
